name: story-image
description: Optional story image plugin that converts structured prompts into generated images with continuity.

story_image.instruction:
When the current moment should be visualized, append:
```json:story_image
{
  "title": "Scene cover title",
  "story_background": "What happened before this frame, in 1-3 sentences.",
  "prompt": "What should be shown in this exact frame.",
  "continuity_notes": "Visual continuity constraints.",
  "reference_image_ids": ["optional-previous-image-id"],
  "layout_preference": "auto",
  "scene_frames": ["optional scene beat 1", "optional scene beat 2"]
}
```
Rules:
- `story_background` is required for every image.
- `prompt` must describe only the current frame.
- For follow-up frames, always include `reference_image_ids` from prior `story_image` blocks when available.
- Prior image references are mainly for style/character continuity; scene can still change when story requires.
- Do not emit `story_image` in every turn; use only key moments.

en.name: Story Image
en.description: Story image plugin that converts structured prompts into generated images with continuity.

zh.name: 故事图像
zh.description: 将结构化提示词转换为保持连续性的生成图像。

settings.label: Image Style Preset
settings.description: Visual style direction for generated images.

zh.label: 图像风格预设
zh.description: 生成图像的视觉风格方向。

settings.label: Image Emission Mode
settings.description: When to emit story_image blocks: manual (only via button), key_moments (auto at dramatic beats), every_turn (every response).

zh.label: 图像触发模式
zh.description: 何时生成图像：manual（手动触发）、key_moments（戏剧性节点自动）、every_turn（每回合）。

settings.label: Multi-Scene Layout Policy
settings.description: Layout preference when prompt involves multiple scenes.

zh.label: 多场景布局策略
zh.description: 提示词涉及多个场景时的排版偏好。

settings.label: Image Prompt Template

zh.label: 图像提示词模板
zh.description: 支持占位符 {{story_background}}、{{frame_prompt}}。可选：{{continuity_notes}}、{{reference_summary}}、{{style_preset}}、{{negative_prompt}}。以下为针对支持中文提示词模型的默认模板。

settings.label: Negative Prompt
settings.description: Things to avoid in generated images.
settings.default: blurry, extra limbs, distorted face, low detail

zh.label: 负向提示词
zh.description: 生成图像时需要避免的元素。以下为针对支持中文提示词模型的默认值。
zh.default: 模糊, 多余肢体, 变形面部, 低细节

settings.label: Reference Frames Count
settings.description: Max previous frames used as reference.

zh.label: 参考帧数量
zh.description: 用于风格连续性参考的历史帧最大数量。

zh.label: 严格连续性
zh.description: 强化角色与道具的视觉一致性。

settings.label: LLM Prompt Enhancement
settings.description: Use the LLM to refine raw scene descriptions into optimized image generation prompts with cinematic lighting, composition, and quality modifiers before sending to the image API.

zh.label: LLM 提示词优化
zh.description: 使用 LLM 将原始场景描述优化为包含电影光影、构图和画质修饰词的专业图像生成提示词，再发送给图像 API。
